English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Susan Watkins papers
Watkins, Susan M., 1943-
23-19-4278
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1964-2016 Correspondence, course material, memorabilia, and published material. Includes correspondence, course material, awards, and publications documenting her founding of the academic field of functional apparel design and her career at Cornell. Collection material in English 10087351
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
December 2017
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, December 2017
Date modified:
RMC Staff, March 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Watkins earned a B.S. in consumer services and business in 1965 and an M.S. in textiles and clothing in1967 both from Pennsylvania State University. In 1967 she was hired in the Department of Textiles and Apparel at Cornell University as an assistant professor, becoming a professor emeritus in 1999. She founded the academic field of functional apparel design and in 1991 was inducted as a Fellow into the International Textile and Apparel Association.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, course material, awards, and publications documenting her founding of the academic field of functional apparel design and her career at Cornell.
Cite As:
Susan Watkins papers, #23-19-4278. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
See also collections #23-2-2817, #47-10-3394 and #23-19-2807 for additional biographical information.
Protective clothing. Fashion design. Textiles and Apparel -- Study and teaching. Clothing industry -- Study and teaching. Protective clothing. Fashion design. Cornell University -- : Faculty. New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Textiles and Apparel
